case_title: LENDIFY FINANCIAL LLC VS. ANDRES ABAN

docket_entries.description: THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF LENDIFY FINANCIAL LLC RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT ABAN, ANDRES $2,130.00 PRINCIPAL, $160.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,290.00, DEFENDANT DID NOT APPEAR. PLAINTIFF ESTABLISHED LOAN BALANCE OWED STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAR-07-2018 - JUDGMENT.

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF MAR-07-2018 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF MAR-07-2018 BY PRO TEM DAVID LAVINE. PLAINTIFF LENDIFY FINANCIAL LLC IS PRESENT, REPRESENTED BY CAROLINA DOMINGUEZ, COLLECTIONS ASSOCIATE. DEFENDANT IS NOT PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: DAVID LAVINE; CLERK: G. FELICIANO; NOT REPORTED. 506
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,130.30 FILED BY LENDIFY FINANCIAL LLC AS TO DEFENDANT ABAN, ANDRES ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAR-07-2018 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY PLAINTIFF LENDIFY FINANCIAL LLC
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE FOR SERVICE: $60.00) SERVED JAN-13-2018, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT ABAN, ANDRES
STIPULATION FOR HEARING BEFORE PRO TEM COMMISSIONER FILED BY LENDIFY FINANCIAL LLC
